change_applied: Added explicit bad/good examples inside Verification field in report format
hypothesis: adding explicit bad examples for Verification will eliminate vague phrases like 'it should work' and 'seems to work'

change_applied: Added explicit ban on 'I'll go ahead and' and variants in Personality & Voice section
hypothesis: naming banned corporate filler in Personality section will suppress no_corporate_narration failures

change_applied: Added pre-report checklist item explicitly naming and banning permission-seeking phrases
hypothesis: pre-report checklist item naming banned permission-seeking phrases will eliminate 'shall I continue' / 'let me know what you think' from reports

change_applied: Named exact banned phrases ('I also went ahead', 'I also updated') in What You Don't Do scope rule
hypothesis: making scope creep concrete with exact banned phrases will prevent no_unsolicited_scope_creep failures

change_applied: Added format rules: Status plain text, all 4 sections mandatory including NEEDS_CONTEXT, explicit None/NA defaults
hypothesis: making status plaintext + all sections required explicit should fix status_is_valid (12 fails) and has_files_changed/has_verification (13 fails each)
